resources.string: For learning only, or suffer the consequences!
Only download attachments when manually requested
Automatically download attachments for incoming emails
Chinese map detailed version, powerful features, select the king community you want
Click on the lower left corner to simulate location
Please click on map location or search location
Enabling WIFI (even if no hot spot is connected) will cause the location to flash back to the real location. It is recommended to turn off WIFI and use mobile traffic for games!
No places found, because location permission is disabled.
Are you sure you want to delete the search record?
Are you sure you want to delete all history records?
cannot jump to developer options, please make sure your device is in developer mode
You can travel anywhere in the world
Press again to exit the application
"Longitude and latitude out of limit! -180.0<经度<180.0 -90.0<纬度<90.0"
Search or click on historical location
Search or click on map location
Location failed, please manually select the location point

\u0009\u0009\u0009\u0009 \u0009 In order to support the application to obtain positioning information and simulate positioning information, positioning wizard will collect location data, even if the positioning wizard is running in the background, it will still collect such data. This type of information is only obtained locally and is not saved remotely.
To enable the locating permission for applications to obtain locating information and simulate locating information, you are advised to enable the locating permission.
Click on map location or search location

"1. This software is designed for simulation and location development and will not collect any user data. It is strictly prohibited to use this software to violate the privacy of others or to profit from the game. If the software user fails to comply with this regulation, please delete it immediately. For any adverse consequences caused by users' use of the software, such as disclosure of their own or others' privacy, the users shall be solely responsible, and the software authors shall not be liable. 2. The User shall not reverse engineer, decompile or disassemble the software products. Otherwise, the user shall be deemed as an infringement and bear the adverse consequences arising therefrom. 3. The software guarantees that it does not contain any virus, Trojan horse or other malicious code that damages user data. However, since the software product can be downloaded and spread through the network and other means, the software author cannot guarantee whether the software downloaded from a site other than the one designated by the software author is infected with computer viruses, or whether there are disguised Trojan horse programs or hacker software hidden. No liability for direct or indirect damages arising therefrom. 4. The software is constantly updated to provide users with new features and fix bugs in the software. At the same time, the software author guarantees that the software during the upgrade process does not contain any malicious code designed to destroy the user's computer data. 5. Due to the differences and complexity of the software and hardware environments of users' computers, the functions provided by the software cannot guarantee that they can be normally executed or achieve the results expected by users under any circumstances. The author of the software shall not assume any responsibility for any consequences arising from the use of the software by the user. 6. If User installs the Software by himself, it indicates that User trusts the software author, voluntarily chooses to install the Software and accepts all terms of this Agreement. If the user does not accept this agreement, please delete it immediately. "
This app needs access to your location.
I have read the disclaimer and agree to all terms
Long press to copy the above code and send it to the developer, then fill in the obtained code below
Search failed, please check the network connection
takes effect after restarting the joystick
in \" Developer Options → Select simulated location information application \"
To simulate the stability of positioning, it is recommended to enable \" show floating window \"
Whether to enable the GPS location service?
